Document:
# Mothroach
The mothroach is the inevitable result of mixing moth and cockroach DNA in the genetics lab one too many times. It is small, it can speak, and it is completely harmless — which makes it one of the more endearing things to encounter on a chaotic shift.
As a mothroach you are [bold]small[/bold] enough to fit into tight spaces and move through areas the crew cannot easily follow. You can speak, allowing for communication with crew members who are curious or alarmed by your existence.
You have [bold]no offensive capabilities[/bold] and cannot harm anyone. You are, fundamentally, a very small moth-roach with something to say.
